docs.a11yFontDesc: Users can adjust the overall font size based on reading habits, device size, and vision needs. When font size increases, the page maintains complete information, unbroken layout, and fully functional features. Feed, paper cards, summaries, tags, buttons, and AI reading tools all adapt naturally with font size.
docs.a11yLangDesc: Prioritize covering languages with larger global user populations, while supporting important regional languages and different writing systems.
docs.a11yRtlDesc: Full right-to-left reading support for RTL languages like Arabic and Urdu. Page direction, navigation position, back icons, card arrangement, information flow lines, and input fields are all correctly mirrored. LTR content such as paper titles, author names, formulas, code, and DOIs display correctly in RTL pages, avoiding mixed-layout chaos.
docs.a11yTypoDesc: For languages without space-based word segmentation like Chinese, Japanese, and Thai, title truncation, summary line breaking, tag arrangement, and card heights are individually optimized; for tonal languages like Vietnamese and Thai, line height and glyph clarity remain stable and readable on small screens.
docs.accessibilityDesc: PaperDaily Design System doesn't treat multilingual support as simple translation—it sees it as a foundational capability of 'equal accessibility.'
docs.aiAnswerText: The real novelty here is not simply bigger models, but expressing reasoning gains as a predictable function.
docs.aiCopy: An AI response should not be one large chat blob. It should separate answer, evidence, and actions.
docs.aiRuleOne: Lead with a short judgment before longer detail.
docs.aiRuleThree: Give next analysis actions right after the answer.
docs.aiRuleTwo: Quoted evidence and model inference must be visually separated.
docs.commandCopy: Desktop should not stop at a search box. It should have a command entry for navigation, search, and AI actions.
docs.commandRuleOne: Merge search, navigation, and actions into one entry.
docs.commandRuleTwo: Empty input should still show suggested actions.
docs.copilotAnswerCopy: The center area is for reasoning and analysis, not for stuffing citations, related papers, and actions into one bubble.
docs.heroCopy: PaperDaily is built for users who need to track cutting-edge papers, conference news, and research trends every day, organizing complex academic information into a clear, trustworthy, and sustainably browsable information experience. Precise recommendations, practical AI, and smooth interactions make cutting-edge research as natural, restrained, and readable as a well-curated knowledge magazine.
docs.miniAuthHeroDesc: Sign in to sync bookmarks, reading progress, keyword preferences, and recommendation feedback. Efficient organization on desktop, effortless reading on mobile.
docs.miniAuthHeroTitle: Tune the paper recommendation system to your research taste.
docs.miniAuthLoginSubtitle: Continue with your bookmarks, recommendation profile, and reading progress.
docs.miniBriefingDesc: Based on 4 interest areas and 3 voting calibrations, here's a tangible starting point for you.
docs.miniBriefingDesc1: Read literature continuously like a researcher, not starting from scratch every time.
docs.miniBriefingDesc2: Tool-calling agents significantly improve review quality.
docs.miniDesktopFeedDesc: The improvement pattern of model reasoning ability becomes predictable, changing how training budgets are planned.
docs.miniDesktopWhyMattersDesc: Key findings, related papers, and next steps all in the right column.
docs.miniFeedDesc1: Precise control of therapeutic switches improves clinical safety.
docs.miniFeedDesc2: The improvement pattern of model reasoning ability becomes estimable.
docs.miniInterestsDesc: No need to be too specific—the system will keep adjusting later. Keep "not interested" to continue refining.
docs.miniInterestsTitle: Pick a few areas you care about
docs.miniLoginSubtitle: Continue with your daily paper briefing, bookmarks, and reading queue.
docs.miniMacosKeyFindingDesc: Reasoning ability improves predictably with compute.
docs.miniNotificationsAuthorDesc: Get notified when followed authors publish new papers.
docs.miniNotificationsDailyDesc: Every morning at 8, 5 curated papers + summaries.
docs.miniNotificationsDesc: Only notify when truly valuable: daily briefing, followed author updates, and key breakthrough pushes. Easy to turn off.
docs.miniNotificationsTitle: Let notifications be a helper, not an interruption.
docs.miniNotificationsTrendDesc: Get notified when important breakthroughs appear in a field.
docs.miniRegisterDesc: We only ask for necessary information.
docs.miniSavedDesc1: This paper provides a theoretical framework for the magneto-optical characterization of superparamagnetic nanoparticles in solution.
docs.miniSavedDesc2: Achieved a 10 cm ultra-stable silicon cavity with extremely low frequency instability at 5K temperature.
docs.miniSurveyDesc: Quickly mark your research interest directions.
docs.miniSurveyPaperDesc: Read literature continuously like a researcher.
docs.miniWelcomeDesc: 5 to 12 high-quality papers every day. First get the key takeaways in plain language, then get the original text, authors, and verifiable sources.
docs.miniWelcomePaperDesc: More → reasoning. Agent and summary quality also improving.
docs.miniWelcomeTitle: Make papers as readable as a feed, but still reliable
docs.pagesCopilotCopy: The AI workspace should feel like a productivity tool, not a generic chat page.
docs.pagesDetailCopy: The upper half of a detail page answers four things only: what it says, the finding, why it matters, and what to do next.
docs.pagesFeedCopy: The home page should start as a scrollable feed, not a filter-heavy backend.
docs.pagesOnboardingCopy: Registration and taste setup should collect only what is necessary instead of asking for the entire profile upfront.
docs.pagesSubtitle: Click a card to view the full page mock. Covers feed, reader, dashboard, onboarding and more.
docs.paperCardCopy: One card should answer whether it is worth reading, saving, and why it was recommended.
docs.paperCardDemoCopy: The summary should feel like a content product, not a database field.
docs.paperCardDemoSource: ArXiv AI · Because you saved reasoning
docs.paperCardRuleOne: Title up to 2 lines, summary up to 3 lines.
docs.paperCardRuleThree: Save, read, and more-like-this should respond in place.
docs.paperCardRuleTwo: Keep recommendation reason in the source line instead of making it a second headline.
docs.philosophyDesc: PaperDaily is built for users who need to track cutting-edge papers, conference news, and research trends every day, organizing complex academic information into a clear, trustworthy, and sustainably browsable information experience.
docs.radiusDesc: Rounded corners are the core source of PaperDaily Design's approachability. Soft curves counterbalance the seriousness of academic content, making the consumption experience of research information lighter and more friendly.
docs.radiusRuleOne: Approachability first: Large rounded corners are the visual DNA of PaperDaily, using soft curves to build an approachable, agile, non-sharp product personality.
docs.radiusRuleTwo: Hierarchy correspondence: The more prominent and interactive the element, the larger the radius; container elements have moderate rounded corners, forming a clear visual hierarchy.
docs.refBidiDesc: Handling RTL and bidirectional text in HTML/CSS
docs.refDesc: Following W3C Internationalization and accessibility-related specifications to ensure correct implementation of multilingual and accessible design.
docs.refLinebreakDesc: Line breaking and typography differences across writing systems
docs.refRtlDesc: Basic text direction setting for right-to-left scripts
docs.ruleOneCopy: Components default to quick judgment, not academic display. Each card carries one main decision: to read or not.
docs.ruleThreeCopy: Let users discover value continuously, not through noise and stimulation. Light feedback, clear rhythm, each paper leads to the next.
docs.ruleTwoCopy: No Times New Roman or academic serif styling. Build credibility through clear hierarchy, evidence chains, and complete sources.
docs.sheetCopy: On mobile, feedback, filters, and extra actions should use a bottom sheet instead of hiding behind obscure long-press menus.
docs.sheetRuleOne: Put primary actions first and risky actions at the bottom.
docs.sheetRuleThree: Closing motion should feel clean and quick.
docs.sheetRuleTwo: Keep it reachable with one hand without crushing reading space.
docs.summaryBrief: More high-quality data and compute improve reasoning performance steadily.
docs.summaryCopy: Use it in the upper half of a detail page to compress the key point into one glance.
docs.summaryDetail: More high-quality data and more training compute improve reasoning performance steadily, and the trend is predictable enough to inform budgeting and experiment planning.
docs.summaryRuleOne: 2 to 4 lines only. No long paragraphs.
docs.summaryRuleTwo: Highlight the conclusion without heavy saturated blocks.
landing.aiAnswerCopy: The real novelty here is not simply bigger models, but expressing reasoning gains as a predictable function.
landing.cardComponentsCopy: Cards, command bar, summary block, AI answers, and bottom sheets all come with real state changes.
landing.cardPagesCopy: Feed, detail page, AI workspace, and onboarding become reusable patterns instead of one-off screens.
landing.cardPagesTitle: Page cases come as reusable templates
landing.cardPhilosophyCopy: No vague storytelling. Just product tone, typography stance, density, and interaction rules.
landing.cardPhilosophyTitle: Keep only the principles that matter
landing.feature1Copy: No need to repeatedly search through massive papers—every day, see high-value content directly related to your research direction, interests, and reading habits.
landing.feature2Copy: AI doesn't stop at showing off—it distills paper highlights, explains methodological contributions, generates speed-read summaries, and helps you quickly judge whether a paper is worth reading.
landing.feature3Copy: The interface is restrained, clear, and smooth. Browse, read, save, track—all in one flow, making research information naturally enter your workflow like everyday content consumption.
landing.footerDesc: Precise recommendations, practical AI, and smooth interactions—make cutting-edge research like a well-curated knowledge magazine.
landing.heroSubtitle: With clear, restrained, and trustworthy UI, turn complex cutting-edge knowledge into an information experience that everyone can find, read, and use faster.
landing.kfCopy: The upward trend in reasoning performance becomes estimable, which will change how training budgets and evaluation plans are made.
landing.kfPlainEnglish: Bigger models plus better data steadily improve reasoning ability.
landing.kfWhyItMatters: Teams can plan compute budgets more accurately and reduce blind trial and error.
landing.missionDesc: Many valuable new ideas struggle to reach more people—not just because the content itself is complex, but because it's trapped in hard-to-read interfaces, fragmented information, language barriers, and inefficient tools. What PaperDaily Design System solves is: how to make complex content clear, ensure important information is accurately recommended, and let artificial intelligence truly serve reading and judgment.
landing.missionDesc2: As a set of interface engineering specifications for global researchers, PaperDaily Design System natively supports multilingual and bidirectional typography, including full adaptation for right-to-left reading habits such as Arabic. The system includes built-in global accessible font scaling, colorblind-friendly color schemes, and high-contrast modes, ensuring that users with visual impairments, cognitive differences, and different device conditions can all access cutting-edge knowledge equally. Interface engineering is not just about aesthetics—it's about enabling everyone to comfortably approach the world's research frontier.
landing.missionTitle: The Mission of PaperDaily Design System
landing.pageDescription: PaperDaily Design System — A high-quality paper feed for researchers. Precise recommendations, practical AI, and smooth interactions make cutting-edge research as natural and readable as a well-curated knowledge magazine.
landing.pageTitle: PaperDaily Design — Paper Daily Design System
landing.previewSummary: Know whether to open it in three seconds and whether to save it in ten.
landing.subtitle: The homepage stays minimal. The docs site carries philosophy, component rules, page cases, and interactive demos.
landing.title: A design guideline site for a paper product, built more like Ant Design than a marketing page.
